title: Add a Knowledge Base to Your Agent
lede: Upload your FAQs, policies, and support documents so your Smart Agent answers questions with accurate, up-to-date information.

steps.title: Open the Knowledge Base Panel
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open your agent.
  2. In the middle column, click the Knowledge Base panel.

images.caption: The Knowledge Base panel lists the files attached to your agent.
The Knowledge Base panel lists the files attached to your agent.

steps.title: Upload Your Documents
steps.content:
1. Click to upload a file (for example PDF or TXT).
  2. Wait while iMash processes and embeds it so the agent can search its contents. If a file was already uploaded, you will be told.
  3. The Knowledge Base panel turns on automatically once at least one file is attached.

images.caption: An attached knowledge base becomes searchable during conversations.
An attached knowledge base becomes searchable during conversations.

steps.title: Verify the Answers
steps.content:
1. Open Test Agent and connect.
  2. Ask questions your document answers (for example business hours or the support email).
  3. Confirm the agent replies using facts from your file.

steps.title: Improve Accuracy
steps.content:
• If the agent does not pull from the file, add guidance to the prompt - for example: "When asked a question, answer from the FAQ in your knowledge base."
  • Use clear, well-structured documents and keep them current.
  • Split large topics into separate files so retrieval stays focused.

cards.title: Add Tools
cards.description: Let the agent take actions like booking and transfers.

cards.title: Use Custom Variables
cards.description: Personalize responses with CRM data and API variables.

cards.title: Test Your Agent
cards.description: Confirm answers come from your uploaded documents.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials

metaTitle: Add a Knowledge Base to Your Agent | iMash Docs
metaDescription: Upload FAQs and support documents to your iMash Smart Agent so it answers with accurate information. Learn to upload, verify, and improve knowledge-base accuracy.
